title: IdentifyRequestBody
description: IdentifyRequestBody schema from Amplitude Identify API

api_key.description: The API key for the Amplitude project.

identification.description: An array of identification objects containing user_id or device_id and user_properties.

user_id.description: A readable ID specified by you. Required unless device_id is present.

device_id.description: A device-specific identifier. Required unless user_id is present.
